source: Explain why a React component re-renders when an inline object prop is recreated on every render. Keep technical terms exact. Show the fix with useMemo and mention shallow comparison.

Fix auth middleware token expiry bug. Do not change the API contract. Keep the current error message exactly the same. The likely bug is that token expiry uses < instead of <=. Update tests around the boundary case and do not introduce a database migration.

Set up a PostgreSQL connection pool for a service. Keep environment variable names exactly the same. Do not change the health check path `/healthz`. Verify staging before production deploy. Risk: older workers still expect `DATABASE_URL`.
Explain git rebase vs merge for a backend repository. Prefer rg for search. Avoid destructive git commands unless explicitly requested. Preserve the existing API response shape in backend refactors.

Findings: src/auth/session.ts may leak stale auth state after partial invalidation. Keep the external API unchanged. Add a regression test for concurrent invalidation. Risk: admin dashboards currently rely on the old session-miss metric shape.
Refactor a callback-based data fetch helper to async/await. Keep behavior unchanged. Preserve exact error handling semantics. Add tests for timeout and partial failure handling.

Explain microservices vs monolith tradeoffs for a backend team. Keep the comparison concise but technically precise. Mention deployment complexity, team autonomy, debugging complexity, and operational overhead.
Explain a Docker multi-stage build for a Node service. Keep commands exact where relevant. Mention build stage, runtime stage, smaller image size, and dependency isolation.

Current status: PostgreSQL race-condition investigation is in src/db/lock.ts. Repro still exists under concurrent writes only. Unit tests pass; integration tests not run yet. Do not change transaction semantics. Next steps: capture one failing trace, run integration tests, then compare lock ordering.

Implement a React error boundary for a dashboard page. Keep public props unchanged. Preserve the existing design system. Add a smoke test for fallback rendering and a regression test for reset behavior.

Refactor the payments client to isolate retry logic into a single helper. Keep public method names unchanged. Keep the current 429 error message unchanged. Add unit coverage for timeout and 429 retry behavior.
Update the navigation layout in src/ui/nav/layout.tsx. Preserve the existing design system. Keep keyboard navigation behavior unchanged. Add a smoke test for the compact mobile drawer state.

Current status: CSV parser patch is in src/parser/csv.ts. Repro still exists on one legacy fixture only. Unit tests pass; integration tests not run yet. Do not change CSV output shape. Next steps: capture the failing fixture, run integration tests, then compare delimiter normalization.

Findings: src/cache/session_store.ts may retain stale session entries after partial invalidation. Keep the external API unchanged. Add a regression test for concurrent invalidation. Risk: admin dashboards currently rely on the old cache-miss metric shape.
This repository uses Bun for scripts, not npm. Prefer rg for search. Avoid destructive git commands unless explicitly requested. Preserve the existing API response shape in backend refactors.
